notes.three_before:
TWO versions present:
  three@0.184.0  (top-level + all transitives deduped)
  three@0.170.0  (pulled by stats-gl@2.4.2 under @react-three/drei)
notes.three_after:
ONE version:
  three@0.184.0  (all transitives including stats-gl@2.4.2 now deduped)
notes.override_added: Added top-level `overrides: { "three": "$three" }` to package.json (sibling of build block, 2-space indent matched).
notes.npm_install_warnings: No peer-dep warnings from the override. Pre-existing EPERM on better-sqlite3 native rebuild (file locked by running process) — unrelated to this change, pre-existing condition.
dedupe_dry_run_changes: Total: added 2, removed 2, changed 29 — all minor/patch only, no major bumps
notes.dedupe_result: npm dedupe ran successfully. added 2, removed 2, changed 29 packages.
notes.vuln_delta: Pre-dedupe: 21 vulnerabilities (4 low, 8 moderate, 9 high). Post-dedupe: 19 vulnerabilities (4 low, 7 moderate, 8 high). 2 resolved by patch bumps.
notes.build_result: SUCCESS — vite build completed in 10.93s, 862 modules transformed. No errors.

bundle_size_delta.vendor_three: 739.83 kB (gzip: 192.44 kB) — matches prior baseline exactly. Rollup already deduped three in the bundle before this fix; the ~26 MB savings are in node_modules (stats-gl's local three@0.170.0 copy eliminated), not bundle output.
bundle_size_delta.note: No regression in any chunk size.

notes.node_modules_savings: ~26 MB expected per auditor; three@0.170.0 directory removed from node_modules. Rough du not run to avoid blocking.
